potential_missing.source_sentence: If the user has chosen drugs and supplements, the user selects how the payment will be handled.
Once payment is completed, the user may choose whether to provide feedback.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow new users to complete registration.
The system shall end access if registration fails.
The system shall allow registered users to sign in.
The system shall provide access to available facilities after signing in.
The system shall allow users to read news and expert content.
The system shall allow users to continue using the system or finish the session after viewing a result.
The system shall process and validate insurance for available finance-related services.
The system shall check payment with insurance for doctor consultations and complete the payment process.
The system shall allow users to select payment methods (cash or insurance) for drug and supplement purchases.
The system shall complete the payment process for insurance-based payments.
The system shall log out users at the end of their session.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, the user may choose to read news and expert content, explore health-related information, or continue with finance-related services.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to access different types of content (news, expert content, health-related information) after signing in.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When the user chooses health-related information, the user can either check symptoms to get possible disease-related results or use the fitness checking option to calculate fitness-related results.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to choose between checking symptoms for disease-related results or using the fitness checking option.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When the user chooses finance-related services, the next steps depend on whether insurance is available. If insurance is already available, the insurance is processed and validated.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall process and validate existing insurance for users choosing finance-related services.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If insurance is not available, the user goes through the application process and the provided details are validated before insurance is provided.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to apply for insurance if it is not already available and validate the provided details.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide access to available facilities after signing in.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly mention 'available facilities'. It mentions accessing content or services based on user choices.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to continue using the system or finish the session after viewing a result.
hallucinations.reason: The source text only mentions this for health-related information, not for all services.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall process and validate insurance for available finance-related services.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall check payment with insurance for doctor consultations and complete the payment process.
duplicates.reason: Both requirements are about processing insurance, but they refer to different scenarios.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to select payment methods (cash or insurance) for drug and supplement purchases.
ambiguities.reason: The source text does not specify that the user can choose between cash and insurance for all types of services.

Source text:
<<<
A user accesses the healthcare platform. If the user is new, the user first completes registration. If the registration is unsuccessful, access ends there. If the registration is successful, or if the user is already registered, the user signs in to the system.

After signing in, the user can access the available facilities. From there, the user may choose to read news and expert content, explore health-related information, or continue with finance-related services.

When the user chooses health-related information, the user can either check symptoms to get possible disease-related results or use the fitness checking option to calculate fitness-related results. After viewing the result, the user may continue using the system or finish the session.

When the user chooses finance-related services, the next steps depend on whether insurance is available. If insurance is already available, the insurance is processed and validated. If insurance is not available, the user goes through the application process and the provided details are validated before insurance is provided.

After that, the user proceeds depending on the type of service used. If the user has consulted a doctor, the user goes through the payment process, where insurance details are checked and payment is completed. If the user has chosen drugs and supplements, the user selects how the payment will be handled. If the selected payment type is cash, the amount and return date are prepared and the user is informed to pay at the time of delivery. If the selected payment type is through insurance, the payment process is completed by checking insurance details.

Once payment is completed, the user may choose whether to provide feedback. If the user chooses to do so, feedback is collected for the service. After that, the user finishes the session and logs out of the system.
>>>

    "The system shall inform users about cash payment details if chosen as the payment method.",
